title: Trump insists talks at 'rapid pace' — contradicts Iran suspension; posts on Truth Social after heated Netanyahu call
snippet: Trump contradicts Iran's announcement of suspended talks, insisting negotiations have been 'going on continuously' and at a 'rapid pace.' Statement posted on Truth Social shortly after reported heated phone call with Netanyahu. Creates dueling narratives about state of US-Iran negotiations.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 트럼프가 이란의 협상 중단 발표를 정면으로 반박. Truth Social에서 '빠른 속도로 대화 계속' 주장. 양측 간 엇갈리는 메시지는 새로운 정보전 양상
